case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1917 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7580/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.7581/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.7582/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 17.11.2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner being a civil servant will avail the alternate remedy, hence under instructions does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications; leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the alternate remedy in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
